# Output Formatting

Tests for output formatting options in `uv pip compile`.

## Annotation styles

### Block-style annotations (default)

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_requirements_in -->

By default, annotations are shown as block comments.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
anyio==3.7.0
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in
anyio==3.7.0
    # via -r requirements.in
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
```

### Line-style annotations

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_requirements_in_annotation_line -->

The `--annotation-style=line` flag puts annotations on the same line.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
anyio==3.7.0
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --annotation-style=line
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --annotation-style=line
anyio==3.7.0              # via -r requirements.in
idna==3.6                 # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1            # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
```

### No annotations

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::no_annotate -->

The `--no-annotate` flag excludes annotations from output.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
black==23.10.1
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --no-annotate
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --no-annotate
black==23.10.1
click==8.1.7
mypy-extensions==1.0.0
packaging==24.0
pathspec==0.12.1
platformdirs==4.2.0

----- stderr -----
Resolved 6 packages in [TIME]
```

## Header options

### No header

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::no_header -->

The `--no-header` flag excludes the header from output.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
black==23.10.1
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --no-header
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
black==23.10.1
    # via -r requirements.in
click==8.1.7
    # via black
mypy-extensions==1.0.0
    # via black
packaging==24.0
    # via black
pathspec==0.12.1
    # via black
platformdirs==4.2.0
    # via black

----- stderr -----
Resolved 6 packages in [TIME]
```

### Custom compile command

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::custom_compile_command -->

The `--custom-compile-command` flag customizes the header command.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
black==23.10.1
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --custom-compile-command "./custom-uv-compile.sh"
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    ./custom-uv-compile.sh
black==23.10.1
    # via -r requirements.in
click==8.1.7
    # via black
mypy-extensions==1.0.0
    # via black
packaging==24.0
    # via black
pathspec==0.12.1
    # via black
platformdirs==4.2.0
    # via black

----- stderr -----
Resolved 6 packages in [TIME]
```

### Custom compile command via environment variable

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::custom_compile_command -->

The `UV_CUSTOM_COMPILE_COMMAND` environment variable works as well.

```toml
# mdtest

[environment.env]
UV_CUSTOM_COMPILE_COMMAND = "./custom-uv-compile.sh"
```

```toml
# file: requirements.in
black==23.10.1
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    ./custom-uv-compile.sh
black==23.10.1
    # via -r requirements.in
click==8.1.7
    # via black
mypy-extensions==1.0.0
    # via black
packaging==24.0
    # via black
pathspec==0.12.1
    # via black
platformdirs==4.2.0
    # via black

----- stderr -----
Resolved 6 packages in [TIME]
```

## Emit options

### Emit find-links

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::emit_find_links -->

The `--emit-find-links` flag includes find-links in output.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
black==23.10.1
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --emit-find-links --find-links ./
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --emit-find-links --find-links ./
--find-links ./

black==23.10.1
    # via -r requirements.in
click==8.1.7
    # via black
mypy-extensions==1.0.0
    # via black
packaging==24.0
    # via black
pathspec==0.12.1
    # via black
platformdirs==4.2.0
    # via black

----- stderr -----
Resolved 6 packages in [TIME]
```

### Emit find-links from requirements file

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::emit_find_links_relative -->

Relative paths in requirements files are preserved verbatim.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
-f ./
iniconfig
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --emit-find-links
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --emit-find-links
--find-links ./

iniconfig==2.0.0
    # via -r requirements.in

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
```

### Emit build options

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::emit_build_options -->

The `--emit-build-options` flag includes binary options in output.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
black==23.10.1
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --emit-build-options --only-binary black --no-binary :all:
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --emit-build-options --only-binary black --no-binary :all:
--no-binary :all:
--only-binary black

black==23.10.1
    # via -r requirements.in
click==8.1.7
    # via black
mypy-extensions==1.0.0
    # via black
packaging==24.0
    # via black
pathspec==0.12.1
    # via black
platformdirs==4.2.0
    # via black

----- stderr -----
Resolved 6 packages in [TIME]
```

### Emit marker expression

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::emit_marker_expression_conditional -->

The `--emit-marker-expression` flag includes a comment showing valid markers.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
anyio ; sys_platform == 'macos'
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --python-platform linux --emit-marker-expression
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --python-platform linux --emit-marker-expression
# Pinned dependencies known to be valid for:
#    sys_platform == 'linux'

----- stderr -----
Resolved in [TIME]
```

## Input sources

<!--
Note: The stdin input test (compile_requirements_in_stdin) cannot be migrated because
mdtest does not support pipe syntax (e.g., `cat file | command`).
-->

### Missing requirements file

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::missing_requirements_in -->

An error is raised when the requirements file doesn't exist.

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: File not found: `requirements.in`
```

## Compatibility warnings

### Allow unsafe warning

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::allow_unsafe -->

The `--allow-unsafe` flag emits a compatibility warning.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
werkzeug==3.0.1
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --allow-unsafe
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --allow-unsafe
markupsafe==2.1.5
    # via werkzeug
werkzeug==3.0.1
    # via -r requirements.in

----- stderr -----
warning: pip-compile's `--allow-unsafe` has no effect (uv can safely pin `pip` and other packages)
Resolved 2 packages in [TIME]
```

### Legacy resolver error

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::resolver_legacy -->

The `--resolver=legacy` flag is unsupported.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
werkzeug==3.0.1
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --resolver=legacy
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: pip-compile's `--resolver=legacy` is unsupported (uv always backtracks)
```

## Index URL hiding

### Hide index URLs from header

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::hide_index_urls -->

Index URLs are not included in the header by default.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
iniconfig
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --default-index https://test.pypi.org/simple/
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in
iniconfig==2.0.0
    # via -r requirements.in

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
```

## Output file

### Compile to file

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::empty_output -->

The `--output-file` flag writes to a file (and also outputs to stdout).

```toml
# file: requirements.in
anyio==3.7.0
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --output-file requirements.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --output-file requirements.txt
anyio==3.7.0
    # via -r requirements.in
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
```

### Compile to stdout

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_output_file_stdout -->

The `--output-file -` flag writes to stdout.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
anyio==3.7.0
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --output-file -
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --output-file -
anyio==3.7.0
    # via -r requirements.in
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
```

## Hash generation

### Generate hashes

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_hashes -->

The `--generate-hashes` flag includes content hashes.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
iniconfig
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --generate-hashes
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --generate-hashes
iniconfig==2.0.0 \
    --hash=sha256:2d91e135bf72d31a410b17c16da610a82cb55f6b0477d1a902134b24a455b8b3 \
    --hash=sha256:b6a85871a79d2e3b22d2d1b94ac2824226a63c6b741c88f7ae975f18b6778374
    # via -r requirements.in

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
```

## Python version targeting

### Compile for Python 3.12

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_python_312 -->

The `--python-version` flag targets a specific Python version.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
black==23.10.1
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --python-version 3.12
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --python-version 3.12
black==23.10.1
    # via -r requirements.in
click==8.1.7
    # via black
mypy-extensions==1.0.0
    # via black
packaging==24.0
    # via black
pathspec==0.12.1
    # via black
platformdirs==4.2.0
    # via black

----- stderr -----
Resolved 6 packages in [TIME]
```

### Compile without deps

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_python_312_no_deps -->

The `--no-deps` flag excludes transitive dependencies.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
black==23.10.1
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --no-deps --python-version 3.12
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --no-deps --python-version 3.12
black==23.10.1
    # via -r requirements.in

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
```

### Compile with line annotations for Python 3.12

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_python_312_annotation_line -->

The `--annotation-style=line` flag puts annotations on the same line.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
black==23.10.1
```

```console
$ uv pip compile --annotation-style=line requirements.in --python-version 3.12
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile --annotation-style=line requirements.in --python-version 3.12
black==23.10.1            # via -r requirements.in
click==8.1.7              # via black
mypy-extensions==1.0.0    # via black
packaging==24.0           # via black
pathspec==0.12.1          # via black
platformdirs==4.2.0       # via black

----- stderr -----
Resolved 6 packages in [TIME]
```

## Output errors

### Invalid output file format

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_invalid_output_file -->

Using pyproject.toml as output file produces an error.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
anyio==3.7.0
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in -o pyproject.toml
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: `pyproject.toml` is not a supported output format for `uv pip compile` (only `requirements.txt`-style output is supported)
```

### Invalid exclude-newer-package format

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_exclude_newer_package_errors -->

Missing `=` in `--exclude-newer-package` produces an error.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
tqdm
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --exclude-newer-package tqdm
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: invalid value 'tqdm' for '--exclude-newer-package <EXCLUDE_NEWER_PACKAGE>': Invalid `exclude-newer-package` value `tqdm`: expected format `PACKAGE=DATE` or `PACKAGE=false`

For more information, try '--help'.
```

### Invalid exclude-newer-package date

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_exclude_newer_package_errors -->

Invalid date in `--exclude-newer-package` produces an error.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
tqdm
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --exclude-newer-package tqdm=invalid-date
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: invalid value 'tqdm=invalid-date' for '--exclude-newer-package <EXCLUDE_NEWER_PACKAGE>': Invalid `exclude-newer-package` value `invalid-date`: `invalid-date` could not be parsed as a valid exclude-newer value (expected a date like `2024-01-01`, a timestamp like `2024-01-01T00:00:00Z`, or a duration like `3 days` or `P3D`)

For more information, try '--help'.
```

### Omit non-matching constraint annotation

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::omit_non_matching_annotation -->

Constraints with markers that don't apply are omitted from annotations.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
anyio
```

```toml
# file: constraints.txt
idna <3.7; python_version < '3.7'
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in -c constraints.txt
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in -c constraints.txt
anyio==4.3.0
    # via -r requirements.in
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
```

## Nested requirements files

### Relative subfile

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_relative_subfile -->

Requirements files can reference other requirements files in subdirectories.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
-r subdir/requirements.in
```

```toml
# file: subdir/requirements.in
-r requirements-dev.in
```

```toml
# file: subdir/requirements-dev.in
anyio
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in
anyio==4.3.0
    # via -r subdir/requirements-dev.in
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
```
